About Us

Binarypay is the new age online payment system. The leader and the most trusted in the e-currencies payments. We are a large payment firm dealing with hundreds of online plateforms,banks and trading brokers.
With us, you can:
  - Receive
- Send   
  - Deposit
       - Withdraw
     - Transfer
  - Deposit in your preferred broker
  - Withdraw your profits from your preferred broker
  - Add Visa,mastercard,maestro to your binary pay account to make transactions
  - Deposit with paypal withdraw with paypal and other financial plateforms
  - Exchange e-currencies from other plateforms to binarypay
  - Exchange e-currencies from binarypay to other plateforms
